evals.prompt: add retry logic to the order processing service
evals.expected_output: Should read relevant code first, then ask smart batched questions about retry strategy, scope, error types, and existing patterns before coding. Should auto-calibrate to medium depth (2-3 rounds).

evals.prompt: the payment refund endpoint is returning 500 errors intermittently in production
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this as a bug investigation, read relevant payment code, then ask focused questions about repro steps, frequency, recent changes, environment, and logs. Should not jump to fixing without understanding the problem.

evals.prompt: we need to migrate our notification system from email-only to support email, SMS, and push notifications
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this as a large/complex task, do a full deep dive interview covering all dimensions, batch independent questions smartly, and suggest Plan Mode after the interview completes.
